variables.concepts:
**A: Lightweight Comfort** — A minimalist running shoe built for speed and agility. Ultra-lightweight (7.2 oz), responsive foam midsole with energy return, breathable engineered mesh upper, flexible outsole for natural foot movement. Best for: tempo runs, races, experienced runners who prioritize ground feel. $130.

**B: Soft Cushion Support** — A max-cushion shoe designed for protection and comfort over long distances. Thick dual-density foam midsole, structured heel counter for stability, reinforced toe box, slightly heavier (10.8 oz) but supremely comfortable. Best for: long runs, injury-prone runners, heavy strikers. $150.

**C: Versatile Style** — A hybrid running shoe that transitions from track to street. Classic silhouette with modern materials, balanced cushioning, durable rubber outsole, available in 8 colorways. Good enough for casual 5Ks, great for everyday wear. Best for: casual runners, gym-to-brunch crowd, style-conscious buyers. $120.
